name: US Airways Group, Inc.
description: US Airways Group, Inc. was a major American airline holding company headquartered in Tempe, Arizona. It operated US Airways, a prominent carrier that provided extensive domestic and international air travel services. The company also managed subsidiaries including PSA Airlines and Piedmont Airlines, which operated under the US Airways Express brand. Following a significant merger in 2013, US Airways Group became part of the American Airlines Group, leading to the eventual integration of its operations and the retirement of the US Airways brand in 2015.
